response.justification: While the candidate meets the educational and seniority requirements with 16+ years of senior-level software engineering experience, the role requires deep domain expertise in hardware architecture, SoC/IP modeling, and AI accelerator optimization—areas entirely absent from his background. His career has been exclusively in application-level software development (web, backend, mobile), not hardware systems architecture. The gap between software optimization and hardware-level performance architecture is too fundamental for a principal-level hire.
strengths: Senior-level software engineer with 16+ years of experience and proven leadership across multiple platforms
Demonstrated expertise in performance optimization and low-latency systems (DLang async I/O, caching, real-time metadata handling)
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and modern cloud-native development at Naver
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience—explicitly required for the core responsibilities
Career entirely focused on application and web software; no GPU, accelerator, or deep learning infrastructure optimization background
Missing required skills: hardware-software co-design, SIMD/MIMD architecture analysis, and AI workload-specific performance profiling

key_factors.factor: Lack of required SoC/IP and GPU optimization expertise
Senior-level seniority and software engineering fundamentals
